title: EVS-6962
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''EVS-6962''' was an [[EVS Construction Droid]] that was active on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] shortly after [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] helped bring the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] under [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] rule. Under the supervision of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], EVS-6962 uncovered a secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Interrogation Center during its routine tear-down assignment.<ref name="EGtD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> This was later discovered to have been built by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to test prisoners for [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]], as it contained several [[Force detector]]s that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] used during his search for new [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].<ref name="JS">''[[Jedi Search]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
If the identification number for EVS-6962 was entered into a touch-tone phone in the [[Wikipedia:Brooklyn|Brooklyn]] area, it would dial the [[Wikipedia:They Might Be Giants|They Might Be Giants]] [http://tmbw.net/wiki/Dial-A-Song Dial-A-Song service], which was a purposeful insert by [[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]] into ''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''.<ref name="Blog-danwallace|72">{{Blog|danwallace|72|Forgotten Easter Eggs}}</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-02-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''
